feedback.title: will be the first place i do my research from now
Keyboard shortcuts
feedback.description: Power users would benefit from keyboard shortcuts for common actions like navigating between feedbacks, changing status, etc.

feedback.title: Comment threading on feedback
feedback.description: Allow threaded discussions on feedback items so team members and users can have structured conversations.

feedback.title: Merge duplicate feedback items
feedback.description: When duplicates are found, we should be able to merge them into one item while preserving all votes and comments.

feedback.title: Feedback sentiment analysis
feedback.description: Use NLP to automatically tag feedback as positive, negative, or neutral to quickly gauge user sentiment.

feedback.title: Duplicate detection
feedback.description: Users are submitting similar feedback multiple times. An AI-based duplicate detection would save us time on triaging.

feedback.title: Webhook support for events
feedback.description: Trigger webhooks when feedback is created, updated, or status changes so we can integrate with our internal tools.

feedback.title: Voting system improvements
feedback.description: The upvote/downvote UI is not very intuitive. Consider adding vote counts visibly and maybe a 'trending' sort option.

feedback.title: Improve loading speed
feedback.description: The dashboard takes about 4-5 seconds to load when we have more than 200 feedback entries. Performance optimization would be appreciated.

feedback.title: Roadmap view
feedback.description: A public roadmap page that automatically populates from feedback status changes would be amazing for transparency.

feedback.title: SSO login support
feedback.description: Our enterprise clients require SAML/SSO based login. Without it, adoption is blocked for several accounts.

feedback.title: Feedback priority scoring
feedback.description: Automatically score and rank feedback based on vote count, user segment, and recency to help us prioritize the backlog.

feedback.title: Auto-close stale feedback
feedback.description: Feedback items that haven't received activity in 90 days should be auto-closed or flagged for review.

feedback.title: Better onboarding flow
feedback.description: First-time setup is confusing. A step-by-step wizard or tutorial would help new users get started faster.

feedback.title: Add changelog feature
feedback.description: Let us publish changelogs so users can see what feedback has been acted upon. Closes the feedback loop.

feedback.title: Real-time updates
feedback.description: When another team member changes a feedback status, it should reflect in real-time without needing a page refresh.

feedback.title: Two-factor authentication
feedback.description: For security-conscious teams, 2FA should be available as an option for account protection.

feedback.title: Add feedback categories
feedback.description: Currently all feedbacks are in one list. Having categories like 'Bug Report', 'Feature Request', 'Improvement' would help organize better.

feedback.title: Custom branding for widget
feedback.description: Allow us to fully customize the widget colors, fonts and logo so it matches our product's brand identity.

feedback.title: Export data to CSV
feedback.description: We need the ability to export our feedback data to CSV or Excel for offline analysis and reporting to stakeholders.

feedback.title: Search and filter feedback
feedback.description: We have hundreds of feedback items. Need a robust search with filters by status, date range, tags, and vote count.

feedback.title: Batch import feedback
feedback.description: We're migrating from another tool and need to import 500+ existing feedback items. A CSV import feature would help.

feedback.title: API rate limiting issues
feedback.description: When we send bursts of feedback via the API, we occasionally get 429 errors. Please increase rate limits or provide better docs on limits.

feedback.title: Audit log
feedback.description: We need a detailed audit log showing who changed what and when for compliance and accountability purposes.

feedback.title: Bulk actions for feedback
feedback.description: Allow selecting multiple feedback items and performing bulk actions like changing status, adding tags, or deleting.

feedback.title: Role-based access control
feedback.description: Need different permission levels: admin, editor, viewer. Currently everyone has full access which is a security concern.

feedback.title: Feedback analytics dashboard
feedback.description: A dedicated analytics page showing trends, sentiment analysis, most requested features, and response times would be invaluable.

feedback.title: User segmentation for feedback
feedback.description: Tag feedback by user plan (free, pro, enterprise) so we can prioritize feedback from paying customers.

feedback.title: Email notifications for new feedback
feedback.description: As a product manager, I'd love to receive email notifications whenever new feedback is submitted so I can respond quickly.

feedback.title: Widget accessibility improvements
feedback.description: The widget doesn't fully comply with WCAG 2.1 AA. Screen reader support and keyboard navigation need work.

feedback.title: Mobile responsive issues
feedback.description: The sidebar overlaps with the main content area on mobile devices (tested on iPhone 15 and Samsung Galaxy S24).

feedback.title: Widget loading is slow on Safari
feedback.description: The embedded widget takes noticeably longer to load on Safari compared to Chrome. Possible WebKit compatibility issue.

feedback.title: Integrate with Slack
feedback.description: Our team uses Slack heavily. A Slack integration to post new feedback into a channel would streamline our workflow.

feedback.title: Dark mode support
feedback.description: It would be great to have a dark mode option for the dashboard. Working late at night with the bright UI is straining on the eyes.

feedback.title: Embed widget in React Native app
feedback.description: We have a React Native mobile app and need a way to embed the feedback widget natively, not just via WebView.

feedback.title: Multi-language support
feedback.description: Our product serves users globally. Feedback widget and dashboard in multiple languages (Spanish, French, German at minimum) is needed.

feedback.title: Attachment support
feedback.description: Users should be able to attach screenshots or files to their feedback to better illustrate issues they're reporting.

feedback.title: Dashboard widget for Notion
feedback.description: A Notion embed or widget that shows our top feedback items directly in our product wiki would be very useful.

feedback.title: Improved error messages
feedback.description: When API calls fail, the error messages are generic. More descriptive errors would help us debug integration issues faster.

feedback.title: Custom status workflows
feedback.description: The default statuses (Open, Under Review, Closed) don't match our workflow. Let us define custom status names and transitions.

feedback.title: Date range filter on dashboard
feedback.description: Allow filtering the dashboard view by custom date ranges to see feedback trends over specific periods.

feedback.title: It is good
feedback.description: It was very good for tracking expenses everyday

feedback.title: It's a great idea
feedback.description: It's Great idea I am using this app from one week

This is fully white on this widget can you change the theme?
good
hi
Is the data encrypted at rest? We handle sensitive financial feedback and need to ensure data security compliance.
The feedback widget is not showing up on our website after following the integration guide. We're using Webflow. Any specific steps for Webflow sites?
Can you provide a SOC 2 compliance report? Our security team requires it before we can proceed with procurement.
We need a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) signed before onboarding. Can you send us your standard DPA template?
We're managing multiple client projects. Is there a way to switch between different applications without logging out and back in?
Is there a free tier available? I'm a solo developer and the current pricing is a bit steep for my side project.
How do I delete a feedback item? I accidentally posted test data and now it's showing up in our public board.
Love the product! Quick question — is there a way to white-label the widget so our brand name shows instead of yours?
We need to export all our data before our subscription ends next week. What export options are available and what format is the data in?
The feedback form submission is failing with a 500 error when users type emojis in their feedback. This seems like a character encoding issue.
Is there a way to programmatically submit feedback via your API? I couldn't find API documentation anywhere on the site.
Do you offer any discounts for non-profit organizations? We'd love to use your platform but have limited budget.
The analytics numbers on the dashboard don't match what I see when I manually count the feedback items. There seems to be a discrepancy of about 15 items.
We accidentally deleted an application and lost all feedback data. Is there any way to recover it? This happened about 2 hours ago.
Can we integrate your feedback widget with our CRM? Specifically, we'd like feedback to automatically create tickets in our support system.
How do we handle GDPR data deletion requests? If a user asks us to delete their data, how do we remove their feedback from your system?
Is it possible to have different feedback boards for different product lines within the same application? Currently mixing all feedback together.
We're trying to embed the feedback widget on our Next.js app but it's throwing a hydration error. Here's the error: 'Text content does not match server-rendered HTML'. Please advise.
We need to discuss enterprise pricing for our organization (500+ users). Can someone from your sales team reach out?
Can we set up automated responses when users submit feedback? Something like 'Thank you for your feedback, we'll review it within 48 hours'.
Our subscription was charged twice this month. Order IDs: ORD-4821 and ORD-4823. Please process a refund for the duplicate charge.
The widget conflicts with our existing CSS. Specifically, our .btn class styles are being overridden. Can you namespace your CSS classes?
Getting intermittent timeouts when loading the dashboard. Started happening about 3 days ago. Our team is in the EU region — could this be a latency issue?
Is there a Flutter SDK available? We need native mobile integration and the JavaScript widget doesn't work well in WebViews.
Hi, I'm unable to log into my account after the recent update. It says 'invalid credentials' even though I'm sure the password is correct. Can you help?
